'''pamojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:saar|saar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saar|saar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pamojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmejeth|pæmejeth]] || [[word:pæmejej|pæmejej]] || [[word:pæmejesh|pæmejesh]] || [[word:pæmeje|pæmeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamomojoth|pamomojoth]] || [[word:pamomojoj|pamomojoj]] || [[word:pamomojosh|pamomojosh]] || [[word:pamomojo|pamomojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamojoth|pamojoth]] || [[word:pamojoj|pamojoj]] || [[word:pamojosh|pamojosh]] || [[word:pamojo|pamojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamofjoth|pamofjoth]] || [[word:pamofjoj|pamofjoj]] || [[word:pamofjosh|pamofjosh]] || [[word:pamofjof|pamofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamojotho|pamojotho]] || [[word:pamojojo|pamojojo]] || [[word:pamojosho|pamojosho]] || [[word:pamojoko|pamojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamojoth|pamojoth]] || [[word:pamojoj|pamojoj]] || [[word:pamojosh|pamojosh]] || [[word:pamojo|pamojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamojothol|pamojothol]] || [[word:pamojojol|pamojojol]] || [[word:pamojoshol|pamojoshol]] || [[word:pamojokol|pamojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamojothotho|pamojothotho]] || [[word:pamojojojo|pamojojojo]] || [[word:pamojoshosho|pamojoshosho]] || [[word:pamojoko|pamojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamojothon|pamojothon]] || [[word:pamojojon|pamojojon]] || [[word:pamojoshon|pamojoshon]] || [[word:pamojokon|pamojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamojothoro|pamojothoro]] || [[word:pamojojoro|pamojojoro]] || [[word:pamojoshoro|pamojoshoro]] || [[word:pamojokoro|pamojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
